Chronology of every recorded fact about [[The Last Horizon]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== The Captain ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 5''' — The Last Horizon is the original Aethertech starship.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 5''' — The Last Horizon is said to have enabled early humanity's colonization of the stars.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 5''' — The Last Horizon is rumored to be able to transport crew members across the galaxy without passing through Subspace.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 5''' — The Last Horizon is rumored to be able to conjure copies of itself from the Aether.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 5''' — The Last Horizon is rumored to be able to pierce through planets in a single shot.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 5''' — The Last Horizon is rumored to be able to freeze the motion of planetary bodies.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 5''' — The Last Horizon is rumored to be able to construct entire colonies in seconds.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 5''' — The Last Horizon is rumored to be able to terraform systems in a matter of weeks.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 8''' — The Last Horizon may be connected to the cloudy orange planet.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 8''' — The Last Horizon is a light cruiser that is at least four hundred yards long.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 8''' — The Last Horizon's hull plates are smooth metal shaped like a diving bird of prey.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 9''' — The Last Horizon's power is derived from its crew.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 9''' — The Last Horizon requires a Captain to function fully.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 9''' — The Last Horizon can teleport its occupants.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 9''' — The Last Horizon's bridge is made of organic metal.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 9''' — The Last Horizon has a shield stability readout.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 9''' — The Last Horizon has a hangar with virtually indestructible metal doors.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 9''' — The Last Horizon is a vessel that can be competed for control of.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 10''' — The Last Horizon is supposedly a single Zenith Device.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 10''' — The Last Horizon is also known as the Chariot of the Star-Queens.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 10''' — The Last Horizon is a ship that can be competed for in a virtual competition.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 11''' — The Last Horizon is described as the ship of heroes.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 12''' — The Last Horizon is an entity that does not acknowledge Shyrax.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 14''' — The Last Horizon is a giant starship with a golden surface that resembles a winged pyramid.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 14''' — The Last Horizon has a ship's spirit.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 15''' — The Last Horizon is a ship with a crew and a Captain.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 16''' — The Last Horizon is a ship/fellowship.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 16''' — The Last Horizon brought Raion to the iron mountain.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 19''' — The Last Horizon utilizes a Zenith Starship.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 21''' — The Last Horizon is a legendary starship.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 21''' — The Last Horizon contains stone tablets illustrating its six crew members.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 21''' — The crew has not yet tested the weapons of The Last Horizon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 22''' — The Last Horizon is a secret event.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 22''' — The Captain is the leader of The Last Horizon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 24''' — The Last Horizon aims to please regardless of objectives.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 24''' — The Last Horizon is a starship with teleportation capabilities.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 25''' — The Last Horizon is a ship under the protagonist's control.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 26''' — The Last Horizon contains a containment room on its lower decks.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 27''' — The Last Horizon is a ship that left the planet.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 28''' — The Last Horizon accepts only six crew members with whom it has a symbiotic relationship.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 28''' — When the Captain of The Last Horizon dies, the ship goes dormant.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 28''' — Benri looked down on The Last Horizon from a thousand perspectives.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 29''' — The Last Horizon is a ship with a spirit and smooth halls.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 29''' — The Last Horizon is a ship that has grown turrets after accepting Sola as its Sword.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 30''' — The Last Horizon is a ship that an Iron King might try to take.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 31''' — The Last Horizon is a ship located an hour away.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 34''' — The Last Horizon is a ship capable of carving through the Iron Legion with uncountable guns and a storm of light.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 36''' — The Last Horizon is a starship that can travel through Subspace.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 36''' — The Last Horizon is a ship with a crimson shield.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 37''' — The Last Horizon is a ship that Union Intelligence believes Nelthan's ships are capable of capturing.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 40''' — The Last Horizon is a vessel with a secure vault located at the far end from the bridge.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 40''' — The Last Horizon is a ship that was severely damaged in a battle against the Iron King.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 41''' — The Last Horizon is a ship with a spirit named Horizon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 42''' — The Last Horizon is a smooth cruiser that appeared from Subspace.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 42''' — The Last Horizon is a ship that produced an armada's worth of weapons.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 43''' — The Last Horizon is a starship that emerged from Subspace.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 44''' — The Last Horizon can shift its floor to move seats at a user's direction.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 44''' — The Iron King expanded his magic to claim The Last Horizon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 45''' — The Iron King used Eurias to clash with The Last Horizon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 45''' — The Last Horizon's deck was scraped clean by a circle of pink-and-orange fire.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 45''' — The Last Horizon chooses for courage rather than intelligence.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 48''' — The Last Horizon has a bridge.}}

== The Engineer ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 3''' — The Last Horizon is a ship that identifies itself to Shyrax's vessel.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 3''' — The Last Horizon is intended to be Shyrax's flagship.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 4''' — The Last Horizon judges abilities to determine superiority.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 6''' — The Last Horizon provides fabricator technology.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 6''' — The Last Horizon provides fabricator schematics.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 7''' — The Last Horizon is a group with specific recruitment qualifications.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 16''' — The Last Horizon is a ship that Mell is traveling on.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 17''' — Shyrax intends to keep The Last Horizon a rumor.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 18''' — The Last Horizon is a group that requires worthy heroes.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 19''' — The narrator lives aboard The Last Horizon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 21''' — The Last Horizon has a personal weapons laboratory.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 21''' — The Last Horizon's personal weapons laboratory is a wide, open room of greenish metal with spaces for projects.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 23''' — The Last Horizon is a starship that uses hiding for protection instead of an invisibility spell.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 24''' — The Last Horizon possesses the mythical ability of constructing fleets.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 24''' — The Last Horizon possesses the mythical ability of terraforming.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 26''' — The Last Horizon is a ship that the students wish to see.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 29''' — The Last Horizon is a ship that is dwarfed by the emptiness of the planet's crust.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 33''' — The Last Horizon is a damaged ship.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 33''' — The Last Horizon faced down the full force of the Iron Legion.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 34''' — The Last Horizon is a ship that stays close to the asteroid.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 35''' — The Last Horizon is a ship commanded by Captain Varic Vallenar.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 38''' — The Last Horizon is the narrator's group/ship.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 38''' — The Last Horizon is a ship that unloads weapons systems on Starhammer.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 41''' — The Last Horizon possesses full power that can be used against Starhammer.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 42''' — The Last Horizon is a dark metal starship with smooth plates that shine blue-green at the edges.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 42''' — The crew of The Last Horizon is a rogue crew with no allegiances.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 43''' — The Grave Hound went after The Last Horizon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 44''' — Raion Raithe is the Knight of The Last Horizon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 46''' — The Last Horizon is a ship equipped with scanners.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 48''' — The Last Horizon is a ship that has shuttles.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 50''' — The crew is aboard a frigate originally fabricated by The Last Horizon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 50''' — The Last Horizon is Mell's affiliation.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 51''' — The Last Horizon is a ship that has reverted to a pile of dead metal.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 52''' — The remaining crew of The Last Horizon came for their captain.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 54''' — The Last Horizon rose to face Starhammer.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 54''' — The Last Horizon has purple plates.}}

== The Knight ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 5''' — The Last Horizon prints smooth, organic-looking ships covered in dark metal plates that shine blue-green at the seams.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 5''' — The Last Horizon is a vessel where Shyrax will attend to her duties.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 6''' — The Last Horizon is a group of which Raion Raithe is a Knight.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 10''' — The Last Horizon is a ship captained by the narrator with firepower surpassing that of the Divine Titans.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 11''' — The Last Horizon is a group that includes Raion.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 13''' — A shuttle was borrowed from The Last Horizon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 14''' — The Last Horizon is a group that people would love to have a connection to.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 14''' — The Last Horizon has full power.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 15''' — The Last Horizon is a ship that fabricated a long-range cruiser.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 16''' — The Last Horizon is a location where Starhammer is held.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 18''' — Shyrax reappears on the bridge of The Last Horizon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 18''' — Mell contacted The Last Horizon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 21''' — The Last Horizon is a starship at least five hundred yards long shaped like a predatory bird in a dive.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 23''' — The Last Horizon is a ship with a hallway that can tremble.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 24''' — The Last Horizon is a group or entity associated with the hero Horizon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 24''' — The Last Horizon is the source of memory manifestation magic.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 27''' — Raion represents The Last Horizon in the duel.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 29''' — The Last Horizon is a group or vessel commanded by Varic.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 32''' — The medical room of The Last Horizon is small but uses healing magic and medical Aethertech to handle many patients in limited space.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 33''' — The Last Horizon is a blue-green triangle on the holographic depiction of the Visiria system.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 33''' — The Last Horizon is a ship equipped with magic amplification systems.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 35''' — The Last Horizon was the target of a trap.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 36''' — The Last Horizon is a ship that entered Alliance space.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 36''' — The Last Horizon is a starship being surrounded by Visiri ships.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 37''' — The Last Horizon is a ship constructed with Zenith Era alloys.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 37''' — The Last Horizon was shaking from taking hits.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 39''' — The Last Horizon is a ship that provides firepower.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 39''' — The Last Horizon is a ship that can be connected to entities by a green blade of endless length.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 41''' — The Last Horizon is a group that Titan Knights might work with.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 42''' — The Last Horizon is a ship that the Blue Titan attempted to call.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 43''' — The Last Horizon performs the roles of the Yellow Knight, White Knight, and Green Knight.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 44''' — The Last Horizon is a ship with a bridge where the pilot reappeared.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 44''' — The Last Horizon is a ship Raion expects Shyrax to return to.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 45''' — The Last Horizon has a Pilot aboard.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 45''' — The Last Horizon is a ship that provides spotlight for the Corporation.}}

== The Pilot ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 1''' — The Last Horizon is a group that people have varying opinions about in the Visiria relief effort.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 1''' — The Last Horizon is a group that helped save victims of a battle.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 2''' — The Last Horizon is a group that has been attacking planets and defending them from the D’Niss.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 2''' — The Last Horizon is a starship that appears as a hologram in the meeting.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 3''' — The Last Horizon is a ship with a bridge where the narrator sits.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 6''' — The Last Horizon is currently on a dangerous quest.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 11''' — The Last Horizon glows green with blazing weapons.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 14''' — The Last Horizon is a starship that fabricates ships in a specific style.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 15''' — The Last Horizon is a starship that provides protection for systems.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 16''' — The Last Horizon is a group that Solstice wants to have as an ally.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 18''' — The Last Horizon was prevented from following Benri by Solstice and the Zenith Processor.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 20''' — The Last Horizon possesses non-standard weaponry.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 22''' — Void Prism intends to attempt to persuade The Last Horizon to join them.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 25''' — The Last Horizon is within range of Fathom's planetary defenses.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 26''' — The Last Horizon has put a target lock on the Galaxy’s Capital.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 26''' — The Last Horizon chased a Union cargo ship out of Subspace.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 26''' — Mages are located in the depths of The Last Horizon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 27''' — The Last Horizon is a group that Visiria might consider befriending.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 27''' — The Last Horizon fought for Visiria during the battle against the D’Niss.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 27''' — The volunteers would face a true battle against The Last Horizon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 28''' — The Last Horizon possesses planet-scorching weaponry.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 29''' — The Last Horizon is a ship used by Omega.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 29''' — The narrator is furious with The Last Horizon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 31''' — The wizards aboard Horizon benefited from time spent on The Last Horizon examining a Zenith Device and its magical records.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 32''' — The Last Horizon is an entity Benri Vallenar maintains a connection to.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 32''' — The crew of The Last Horizon are enemies of the Galactic Union and the Vallenar Corporation.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 34''' — The crew of The Last Horizon faced widespread opposition across the galaxy.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 36''' — The Last Horizon is currently refueling by stealing fuel from an abandoned freighter.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 43''' — The Last Horizon is an entity that Lutoch Terelle and Void Prism could potentially take on.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 43''' — The Last Horizon is a group capable of bombarding the Research Center.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 44''' — The Last Horizon is a ship that can be called for extraction.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 45''' — The Last Horizon is a starship currently in battle in orbit.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 45''' — Shyrax can call for emergency teleportation from The Last Horizon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 47''' — The Last Horizon is a ship with an internal camera.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 47''' — Omega successfully arrived aboard The Last Horizon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 47''' — The Last Horizon is equipped with a Subspace Drive and sub-light engines.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 49''' — The Last Horizon is a starship with weapons systems.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
